rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing or removing invalid AGREE clauses without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types to resolve type mismatches
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations
generic_rules: Trace validator diagnostics to the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration on the same line
Remove invalid guarantees instead of adding architecture when the root cause is unresolved references
Use comparison expressions for bool type guarantees, integer arithmetic for int type helpers, and real arithmetic for real type helpers
Ensure all AGREE annexes are placed in valid component type or implementation scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for helper declarations
Use `guarantee "label": expression;` for output dependency contracts
Use `const name : type = value;` for constant declarations
Use `assign output = expression;` for output assignments
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annex contracts
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model and its dependencies
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not leave unresolved references in guarantees; fix or remove the clause instead
